items.name: Wand of Magic Missiles

granted_spells.name: Magic Missile
granted_spells.description: Expend 1–3 charges to cast magic missile at 1st–3rd level (1 charge per level).

items.effect: Has 7 charges. Expend 1–3 charges to cast magic missile at 1st–3rd level. Regains 1d6+1 charges at dawn.

items.name: Wand of Fireballs

granted_spells.name: Fireball
granted_spells.description: Expend 3–7 charges to cast fireball at 3rd–7th level (1 charge per level above 3rd).

items.effect: Has 7 charges. You can expend 1 or more of its charges to cast the fireball spell (save DC 15) from it. For 1 charge, you cast the 3rd-level version of the spell. You can increase the spell slot level by one for each additional charge you expend. Regains 1d6+1 charges at dawn.

items.name: Wand of Lightning Bolts

granted_spells.name: Lightning Bolt
granted_spells.description: Expend 3–7 charges to cast lightning bolt at 3rd–7th level (1 charge per level above 3rd).

items.effect: Has 7 charges. You can expend 1 or more of its charges to cast the lightning bolt spell (save DC 15) from it. For 1 charge, you cast the 3rd-level version of the spell. You can increase the spell slot level by one for each additional charge you expend. Regains 1d6+1 charges at dawn.

items.name: Wand of Web

granted_spells.name: Web
granted_spells.description: Expend 1 charge to cast the web spell (save DC 13).

items.effect: Has 7 charges. Expend 1 charge to cast web (save DC 13). Regains 1d6+1 charges at dawn.

items.name: Wand of Secrets

granted_actions.name: Detect Secret Doors
granted_actions.description: Within 30 ft, the wand pulses if there are secret doors within 30 ft of you.

items.effect: Has 3 charges. Expend 1 charge to detect secret doors and traps within 30 ft. Regains all charges at dawn.

items.name: Wand of Paralysis

granted_spells.name: Hold Person
granted_spells.description: Expend 1 charge to paralyze a humanoid (save DC 15).

items.effect: Has 7 charges. Expend 1 charge to paralyze a humanoid you can see within 60 ft (CON save DC 15). Regains 1d6+1 charges at dawn.

items.name: Wand of Wonder

granted_actions.name: Wild Effect
granted_actions.description: Expend 1 charge and roll d100 for a random magical effect targeting a creature within 120 ft (DC 15 save).

items.effect: Has 7 charges. Expend 1 charge to choose a target within 120 ft and roll a d100 for a random magical effect. Regains 1d6+1 charges at dawn.
